subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! Thy letter was received, and its contents brought infinite joy, for its expression [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه شما رسید و از مضمون سرور بی پایان رخ داد زیرا منطوق
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the departed, @Greatest Name, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts
